updates.title: App Icon Badges!
updates.description: A red notification badge now appears on your app icon for trophy alerts, updates, and reminders. It feels just like a native app!

updates.title: Badge Customization
updates.description: You can now fully customize which notifications trigger the app icon badge in your Settings. You're in control!

updates.title: Dynamic Urgency
updates.description: The app icon badge now increases in count after 10:00 PM if you haven't finished your daily challenge. Don't forget your goals!

updates.title: Emergency Sound Fix
updates.description: Improved reliability for trophy degradation sounds to ensure you never miss a warning when your trophies are in danger.

updates.title: Smoother Experience
updates.description: Faster data syncing and smoother transitions between app screens for a more responsive feel.
